_description: Refresh-attempt log for source_docs/*.md cache files. Distinct from each cache file's metadata header (which records when CONTENT last changed). This log records when a REFRESH was attempted and what happened.

anthropic_subagents.notes: WAVE-2 ADD for Skill A (orchestrator). Programmatic AgentDefinition fields (description/prompt/tools/disallowedTools/model/skills/memory/mcpServers/maxTurns/background/effort/permissionMode), filesystem-based agents, general-purpose subagent via Agent tool. What subagents inherit. Detecting via tool_use blocks with name='Agent' (renamed from 'Task' in v2.1.63). Resuming via session_id+agentId. Subagents cannot spawn subagents.

anthropic_prompt_caching.notes: WAVE-2 ADD for Skill B (knowledge). Automatic caching vs explicit cache_control breakpoints, ephemeral cache lifetime (5 min default, 1h beta), cache hit/miss accounting in usage fields, pricing model (cache_creation_input_tokens vs cache_read_input_tokens), prompt structure best practices for cache reuse. Full 100KB body.

anthropic_citations.notes: WAVE-2 ADD for Skill B (knowledge). Document types (plain text/PDF/custom content), citation indices, citations.enabled per document (all-or-none), cited_text not counted toward output tokens. INCOMPATIBLE with Structured Outputs (returns 400). Streaming via citations_delta. Files API integration via file_id source.

anthropic_files.notes: WAVE-2 ADD for Skill B (knowledge). Beta (anthropic-beta: files-api-2025-04-14). Create-once use-many model. 500MB per file, 500GB per org. File types (PDF/text/images/datasets). Workspace-scoped. Available on Claude API, AWS Platform, Microsoft Foundry; NOT Bedrock or Vertex AI. Only files created by skills/code-execution are downloadable.
